song.title: Creation Sings The Fathers Song
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G D G 1) Creation sings the Father's song; . G D C Em He calls the sun to wake the dawn . Em C D G And run the course of day . G D G Till evening comes in crimson rays. . G D G His fingerprints in flakes of snow, . G D C Em His breath upon this spinning globe, . Em C D G He charts the eagle's flight; . G D G Commands the newborn baby's cry.
[C] Chorus . G D Em Ha lle lu jah! . C G D G Let all creation stand and sing, . G D Em Ha lle lu jah! . C G C G Fill the earth with songs of worship; . C G D G Tell the wonders of creation's King. -!!
[V2] . G D G 2) Creation gazed upon His face; . G D C Em The ageless One in time's embrace . Em C D G Unveiled the Father's plan . G D G Of reconciling God and man. . G D G A second Adam walked the earth, . G D C Em Whose blameless life would break the curse, . Em C D G Whose death would set us free . G D G To live with Him eternally.
[V3] . G D G 3) Creation longs for His return, . G D C Em When Christ shall reign upon the earth; . Em C D G The bitter wars that rage . G D G Are birth pains of a coming age. . G D G When He renews the land and sky, . G D C Em All heaven will sing and earth reply . Em C D G With one resplendent theme: . G D G The glory of our God and King!
